{"id":"project-LICHEN-it5s","title":"DIO field values not range-validated before packing","description":"File: python/src/lichen/rpl/messages.py:149-163

The DIO.to_bytes() method validates rank range but doesn't validate other fields that must fit in specific bit widths:
- rpl_instance_id must be 0-255 (8 bits)
- version must be 0-255 (8 bits)
- dtsn must be 0-255 (8 bits)
- mode_of_operation must be 0-7 (3 bits)
- preference must be 0-7 (3 bits)

Current code:
```python
def to_bytes(self) -> bytes:
    if not 0 <= self.rank <= 0xFFFF:
        raise RplError(f"rank out of range: {self.rank}")
    gmop_prf = (
        (int(self.grounded) << 7)
        | ((self.mode_of_operation & 0x7) << 3)  # silently masks to 3 bits
        | (self.preference & 0x7)  # silently masks to 3 bits
    )
    return (
        bytes([self.rpl_instance_id, self.version])  # will fail if > 255
        ...
    )
```

Impact:
1. Values > 255 for rpl_instance_id, version, dtsn cause bytes() to raise OverflowError
2. mode_of_operation/preference > 7 are silently masked, losing information

Fix: Validate all field ranges before packing.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:23:58.509115Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:23:58.509146Z"}
